title_guess: Di & Ian, Windmill Hill, Avebury, Devizes, Lacock, Bradford & Bath

pages.text:
April 20th.
We set off + left John + Charles with Grandma + Grandpa. Then on to Di + Ian at, [?Nortom] [?Combe], [Waterbourne written above in different ink/annotation]. We stayed the night in their garden, using the bathroom in the bungalow. Great! We went for ~~The next~~ a walk up Windmill Hill.
	The next morning we saw the Great Barn museum at __Avebury__, + walked around the Standing Stones. The wood turner made a rattle for Charles.
	In the afternoon we walked up to West Kennet Long Barrow, into the Neolithic Burial Chamber.
	We drove on and looked around __Devizes__. Antique Book Shop, drinks. We camped at the Lakeside, Rowde ***. Lots of water, glad to have left John + Charles behind.
	In the evening we walked a mile along the foot path up to the Bear for supper

At the top of the field a tree had blown over + we had to climb up 10ft to get over it. Simon + I had home made apple pie.
	The weather is cold – a cold wind.
April 21st.
	At Rowde a man lived who was later burned as a heretic at Salisbury in the reign of Bloody Mary.
	We went to Bowden Hill, St. Anne, [?lay reader] for Church BCP communion. Sermon too long. Then on to __Lacock__, museum for
	Fox-Talbot, inventor of photography 1839. He inherited the Abbey when he was 27 in 1827. Not only was he [?able] in cuneic script, Physics, Maths ([?1/2]" Wrangler) + photo chemistry, he was also a magistrate + MP, working for the

Reform Act, so he served local people. His grand daughter left the Abbey to the N.T. in 1944.
    We walked around Lacock, very pretty, weavers' houses. Church closed.
    We had lunch in Lacock carpark, & read afterwards.
    __Bradford__ also has beautiful stonehouses, 2 churches, one a lovely Saxon chapel. A delicious cream tea at the Bridge Tea Room. Violin with Lion head.
    On towards Bath, we are spending the night at __Stowford Farm,__ west of Trowbridge. Originally a mill, again lots of water, very, very pretty. Cows, goats, hens, peacocks. Clean loos.

__Bath__ Peter map read. We've brought Thomas a plaster angel with guitar. Seen 8 dining room chairs.
    We visited the Roman Baths with
